violations.text: The ceiling through out the sales floor was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must repair all tiles in establishment that are damaged and must replace missing tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The floor in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles in the sales floor area were observed in poor repair. Ceiling tiles must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Multiple Cold holding units was observed above 50 degrees Fahrenheit and not in working order. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The tile floor was observed with multiple areas on the sales floor and by the restrooms in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
